---
title: "4_PrepModelData"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-06"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
rm(list=ls())
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(MuMIn)
library(car)
library(parallel)
library(patchwork)
library(corrplot)
library(glmmTMB)

options(na.action = "na.fail")

readRDS("data/demog/vr_modData/mod_data.rds") %>% list2env(.GlobalEnv)
clim <- read_csv("data/climate/for_analyses/clim_summary.csv")
clim_vars <- names(clim)[!names(clim) %in% c("site", "pop", "year")]

## See what variables were and were not included in mt only models, to reduce variable set if possible
mt.mods <- readRDS("r/modelFitResults/best_mtOnly_mods_2026-04-15.RDS")
summary(mt.mods$surv_mtOnly_best_mod) # tpi, nrt 
summary(mt.mods$growth_mtOnly_best_mod) # est, nrt
summary(mt.mods$growth_var_mtOnly_best_mod) # est, nrt, prcv, tpi 
summary(mt.mods$repro_mtOnly_best_mod) # est, nrt, tri
summary(mt.mods$nflrs_mtOnly_best_mod) # est, nrt, plcv, prcv, tpi, tri
# keep all 

microtopo <- read_csv("data/output/model_microtopo_25cm.csv")
mt_vars <- names(microtopo)[!names(microtopo) %in% c("site", "pop", "plantID","elv_pt")]
mt_mod_vars = mt_vars 

# Add OLRE to nflrs mod data
nflrs_mod_data_scaled$obs_id <- seq_len(nrow(nflrs_mod_data_scaled))

# corrplot(cor(microtopo[mt_vars]))
surv_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat <- relevel(as.factor(surv_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat), ref = "top")
growth_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat <- relevel(as.factor(growth_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat), ref = "top")
repro_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat <- relevel(as.factor(repro_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat), ref = "top")
nflrs_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat <- relevel(as.factor(nflrs_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat), ref = "top")

surv_mod_data_scaled$site <- relevel(as.factor(surv_mod_data_scaled$site), ref = "niwot")
growth_mod_data_scaled$site <- relevel(as.factor(growth_mod_data_scaled$site), ref = "niwot")
repro_mod_data_scaled$site <- relevel(as.factor(repro_mod_data_scaled$site), ref = "niwot")
nflrs_mod_data_scaled$site <- relevel(as.factor(nflrs_mod_data_scaled$site), ref = "niwot")
```

# --------------
# Fit and dredge global models

```{r vr_global_models}
surv_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("surv ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(mt_mod_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + site*aspect.cat + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
surv_mt_mod <- glmer(formula = surv_mt_formula, family = "binomial", data = surv_mod_data_scaled, nAGQ = 0)
summary(surv_mt_mod)

growth_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("growth ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(mt_mod_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + site*aspect.cat + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
growth_mt_mod <- lmer(formula = growth_mt_formula, data = growth_mod_data_scaled, REML = F)
summary(growth_mt_mod)

repro_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("flowered ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(mt_mod_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + site*aspect.cat + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
repro_mt_mod <- glmer(repro_mt_formula, data = repro_mod_data_scaled, family = binomial, nAGQ = 0)
summary(repro_mt_mod)

nflrs_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("total_flrs ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(mt_mod_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + site*aspect.cat + (1|site.pop) + (1|obs_id)"), collapse = " "))
nflrs_mt_mod <- glmer(nflrs_mt_formula, data = nflrs_mod_data_scaled, family = poisson, nAGQ = 0)

# nflrs_mt_formula_olre <- as.formula(paste(c("total_flrs ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(mt_mod_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + site*aspect.cat + (1|site.pop) + (1|obs_id)"), collapse = " "))
# nflrs_mt_olre_mod <- glmer(nflrs_mt_formula_olre, data = nflrs_mod_data_scaled, family = poisson, nAGQ = 0)
# performance::check_overdispersion(nflrs_mt_mod)
# performance::check_overdispersion(nflrs_mt_olre_mod)

summary(nflrs_mt_mod)
```

```{r mt_dredge}
# Note: must not name the cluster 'cl' — MuMIn uses cl <- match.call() internally,
# which causes a name collision that silently breaks parallel dispatch.
clust <- makeCluster(40, type = "FORK")

dredge_surv_mt <- dredge(surv_mt_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2, 
  subset = (est_25 + nrt_25 + tpi_25 + tri_25 + plcv_25 + prcv_25) <= 3)

dredge_growth_mt <- dredge(growth_mt_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2, 
  subset = (est_25 + nrt_25 + tpi_25 + tri_25 + plcv_25 + prcv_25) <= 3)

dredge_repro_mt <- dredge(repro_mt_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2, 
  subset = (est_25 + nrt_25 + tpi_25 + tri_25 + plcv_25 + prcv_25) <= 3)

dredge_nflrs_mt <- dredge(nflrs_mt_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2, 
  subset = (est_25 + nrt_25 + tpi_25 + tri_25 + plcv_25 + prcv_25) <= 3)

stopCluster(clust)
```

```{r mt_model_selection}
surv_mt_best_mod <- update(get.models(dredge_surv_mt, subset = 1)[[1]], nAGQ = 1)
surv_mt_vars <- intersect(rownames(summary(surv_mt_best_mod)$coefficients), mt_mod_vars)

growth_mt_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_growth_mt, subset = 1)[[1]]
growth_mt_vars <- intersect(rownames(summary(growth_mt_best_mod)$coefficients), mt_mod_vars)

repro_mt_best_mod <- update(get.models(dredge_repro_mt, subset = 1)[[1]], nAGQ = 1)
repro_mt_vars <- intersect(rownames(summary(repro_mt_best_mod)$coefficients), mt_mod_vars)

nflrs_mt_best_mod <- update(get.models(dredge_nflrs_mt, subset = 1)[[1]], nAGQ = 1)
nflrs_mt_vars <- intersect(rownames(summary(nflrs_mt_best_mod)$coefficients), mt_mod_vars)
```

```{r growth_var_mt_dredge}
growth_var_mod_data_scaled <- growth_mod_data_scaled %>%
  mutate(growth_resid.sq = residuals(growth_mt_best_mod)^2)
growth_var_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("growth_resid.sq ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(mt_mod_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
growth_var_mt_mod <- lmer(growth_var_mt_formula, data = growth_var_mod_data_scaled, REML = FALSE, na.action = na.fail)

clust <- makeCluster(32, type = "FORK")
dredge_growth_var_mt <- dredge(growth_var_mt_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2,
                                subset = (est_25 + nrt_25 + tpi_25 + tri_25 + plcv_25 + prcv_25) <= 3)
stopCluster(clust)

growth_var_mt_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_growth_var_mt, subset = 1)[[1]]
growth_var_mt_vars <- intersect(rownames(summary(growth_var_mt_best_mod)$coefficients), mt_mod_vars)
```

# save best mt models
```{r save_mt_only_models}

mt_mods <- list(surv_mt_best_mod = surv_mt_best_mod,
                  growth_mt_best_mod = growth_mt_best_mod,
                  repro_mt_best_mod = repro_mt_best_mod,
                  nflrs_mt_best_mod = nflrs_mt_best_mod,
                  growth_var_mt_best_mod = growth_var_mt_best_mod,
                  growth_var_mt_mod_data_scaled = growth_var_mod_data_scaled)

saveRDS(mt_mods,paste0("r/modelFitResults/best_mt_mods_",Sys.Date(),".RDS"))

formula(surv_mt_best_mod)
formula(growth_mt_best_mod)
formula(repro_mt_best_mod)
formula(nflrs_mt_best_mod)
formula(growth_var_mt_best_mod)

```

# --------------
# clim variable winnowing: univariate R², correlation + VIF
# --------------

# try to winnow variables one at a time using AICc
```{r test_clim_vars}

# survival
survival_base <- update(surv_mt_best_mod,nAGQ=0)
base_AICc <- AICc(survival_base)

for(clim_var in clim_vars){
  mod_new <- update(survival_base, as.formula(paste(". ~ . +", clim_var)))
  AICc(mod_new)                   
  cat(paste(c(clim_var,"new:",round(AICc(mod_new),2),"base:",round(base_AICc,2),"\n")))
  cat(round(base_AICc,2) - round(AICc(mod_new),2),"\n")

}

# growth
growth_base <- growth_mt_best_mod
base_AICc <- AICc(growth_base)
for(clim_var in clim_vars){
  mod_new <- update(growth_base, as.formula(paste(". ~ . +", clim_var)))
  AICc(mod_new)                   
  cat(paste(c(clim_var,"new:",round(AICc(mod_new),2),"base:",round(base_AICc,2),"\n")))
  cat(round(base_AICc,2) - round(AICc(mod_new),2),"\n")

}


# nflr
nflr_base <- update(nflrs_mt_best_mod,nAGQ=0)
base_AICc <- AICc(nflr_base)
for(clim_var in clim_vars){
  mod_new <- update(nflr_base, as.formula(paste(". ~ . +", clim_var)))
  AICc(mod_new)                   
  cat(paste(c(clim_var,"new:",round(AICc(mod_new),2),"base:",round(base_AICc,2),"\n")))
  cat(round(base_AICc,2) - round(AICc(mod_new),2),"\n")
}


# repro
repro_base <- update(repro_mt_best_mod,nAGQ=0)
base_AICc <- AICc(repro_base)
for(clim_var in clim_vars){
  mod_new <- update(repro_base, as.formula(paste(". ~ . +", clim_var)))
  AICc(mod_new)                   
  cat(paste(c(clim_var,"new:",round(AICc(mod_new),2),"base:",round(base_AICc,2),"\n")))
  cat(round(base_AICc,2) - round(AICc(mod_new),2),"\n")
}

# in order
surv_clim_vars <- c("gs_meanT_range","gs_meanT_mean","gs_snow_days")
growth_clim_vars <- c("gs_meanT_mean","gs_snow_days")
nflrs_clim_vars <- c("gs_snow_days","win_meanT_range","gs_meanT_mean")
repro_clim_vars <- c("gs_meanT_mean","gs_snow_days","win_meanT_range")
```


```{r mt2clim_global_models}

# MT main effects are fixed (selected in phase 1); clim terms are dredgeable.
# Formula structure mirrors file 5 but with mt and clim roles swapped:
#   log_size_t0 * (year + site + aspect.cat + mt_main + clim_vars) + (mt_main) * (clim_vars) + (1|site.pop)

surv_mt_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(
  "surv ~ log_size_t0 * (year + site + aspect.cat + ",
  paste(c(surv_mt_vars, surv_clim_vars), collapse = " + "), ") + (",
  paste(surv_mt_vars, collapse = " + "), ") * (",
  paste(surv_clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"
))
surv_mt_clim_mod <- glmer(surv_mt_clim_formula, family = binomial, data = surv_mod_data_scaled, nAGQ = 0)
formula(surv_mt_clim_mod)
length(attr(terms(surv_mt_clim_mod), "term.labels"))

growth_mt_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(
  "growth ~ log_size_t0 * (year + site + aspect.cat + ",
  paste(c(growth_mt_vars, growth_clim_vars), collapse = " + "), ") + (",
  paste(growth_mt_vars, collapse = " + "), ") * (",
  paste(growth_clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"
))
growth_mt_clim_mod <- lmer(growth_mt_clim_formula, data = growth_mod_data_scaled, REML = FALSE)
formula(growth_mt_clim_mod)
length(attr(terms(growth_mt_clim_mod), "term.labels"))

repro_mt_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(
  "flowered ~ log_size_t0 * (year + site + aspect.cat + ",
  paste(c(repro_mt_vars, repro_clim_vars), collapse = " + "), ") + (",
  paste(repro_mt_vars, collapse = " + "), ") * (",
  paste(repro_clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"
))
repro_mt_clim_mod <- glmer(repro_mt_clim_formula, family = binomial, data = repro_mod_data_scaled, nAGQ = 0)
formula(repro_mt_clim_mod)
length(attr(terms(repro_mt_clim_mod), "term.labels"))

nflrs_mt_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(
  "total_flrs ~ log_size_t0 * (year + site + aspect.cat + ",
  paste(c(nflrs_mt_vars, nflrs_clim_vars), collapse = " + "), ") + aspect.cat*site + (",
  paste(nflrs_mt_vars, collapse = " + "), ") * (",
  paste(nflrs_clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop) + (1|obs_id)"
))
nflrs_mt_clim_mod <- glmer(nflrs_mt_clim_formula, data = nflrs_mod_data_scaled, family = poisson, nAGQ = 0)
formula(nflrs_mt_clim_mod)
length(attr(terms(nflrs_mt_clim_mod), "term.labels"))
```

```{r mt_clim_dredge}
# Note: do not name the cluster 'cl' — MuMIn uses cl <- match.call() internally,
# which causes a name collision that silently breaks parallel dispatch.
clust <- makeCluster(50, type = "FORK")

# MT main effects are fixed; climate terms are dredgeable.
dredge_surv_mt_clim <- dredge(surv_mt_clim_mod, cluster = clust,# m.lim = c(0,20),
  fixed = c("log_size_t0", surv_mt_vars), trace = 2)

dredge_growth_mt_clim <- dredge(growth_mt_clim_mod, cluster = clust, # m.lim = c(0,20),
  fixed = c("log_size_t0", growth_mt_vars), trace = 2)

dredge_repro_mt_clim <- dredge(repro_mt_clim_mod, cluster = clust, # m.lim = c(0,20),
  fixed = c("log_size_t0", repro_mt_vars), trace = 2)

dredge_nflrs_mt_clim <- dredge(nflrs_mt_clim_mod, cluster = clust, # m.lim = c(0,20),
  fixed = c("log_size_t0", nflrs_mt_vars), trace = 2)

stopCluster(clust)
```

```{r mt_clim_model_selection}
surv_mt_clim_best_mod   <- update(get.models(dredge_surv_mt_clim,   subset = 1)[[1]], nAGQ = 1)
growth_mt_clim_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_growth_mt_clim, subset = 1)[[1]]
repro_mt_clim_best_mod  <- update(get.models(dredge_repro_mt_clim,  subset = 1)[[1]], nAGQ = 1)
nflrs_mt_clim_best_mod  <- update(get.models(dredge_nflrs_mt_clim,  subset = 1)[[1]], nAGQ = 1)
```

```{r growth_var_mt_clim_dredge}
growth_var_mod_data_scaled <- growth_mod_data_scaled %>%
  mutate(growth_resid.sq = residuals(growth_mt_clim_best_mod)^2)

# MT main effects carried forward from the best combined growth model
growth_var_mt_main <- intersect(all.vars(formula(growth_mt_clim_best_mod)), mt_vars)

# Clim vars to consider for growth variance — same pool used above
growth_var_clim_vars <- growth_clim_vars

growth_var_mt_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(
  "growth_resid.sq ~ log_size_t0 * (year + site + aspect.cat + ",
  paste(c(growth_var_mt_main, growth_var_clim_vars), collapse = " + "), ") + (",
  paste(growth_var_mt_main, collapse = " + "), ") * (",
  paste(growth_var_clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"
))
growth_var_mt_clim_mod <- lmer(growth_var_mt_clim_formula, data = growth_var_mod_data_scaled, REML = FALSE)
formula(growth_var_mt_clim_mod)
length(attr(terms(growth_var_mt_clim_mod), "term.labels"))

clust <- makeCluster(50, type = "FORK")

dredge_growth_var_mt_clim <- dredge(growth_var_mt_clim_mod, cluster = clust, m.lim = c(0,20),
  fixed = c("log_size_t0", growth_var_mt_main), trace = 2)

stopCluster(clust)

growth_var_mt_clim_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_growth_var_mt_clim, subset = 1)[[1]]
```
Save all of the models
```{r}

mt2clim_dredge_top10 <- list(
  
  surv_dredge_mt2clim = as.data.frame(dredge_surv_mt_clim) %>% slice_head(n = 10),
  growth_dredge_mt2clim = as.data.frame(dredge_growth_mt_clim) %>% slice_head(n = 10),
  growth_var_dredge_mt2clim = as.data.frame(dredge_growth_var_mt_clim) %>% slice_head(n = 10),
  repro_dredge_mt2clim = as.data.frame(dredge_repro_mt_clim) %>% slice_head(n = 10),
  nflrs_dredge_mt2clim = as.data.frame(dredge_nflrs_mt_clim) %>% slice_head(n = 10)
  
)

mt2clim_model_list <- list(
  growth_var_mt2clim_best_mod = growth_var_mt_clim_best_mod,
  growth_var_mt2clim_best_mod_data = growth_var_mod_data_scaled ,
  
  surv_mt2clim_best_mod = surv_mt_clim_best_mod,
  growth_mt2clim_best_mod = growth_mt_clim_best_mod,
  repro_mt2clim_best_mod = repro_mt_clim_best_mod,
  nflrs_mt2clim_best_mod = nflrs_mt_clim_best_mod
)

saveRDS(mt2clim_model_list,paste0("r/modelFitResults/best_mt2clim_mods_",Sys.Date(),".RDS"))
```
